races.name: Half-Troll
races.description: Born from the unlikely and often bizarre union between trolls and other mortals, Half-Trolls are capable warriors known for their tusks and incredible regenerative blood. Though they lack a unified nation, they share a deep sense of fellowship across Faleria.

subraces.name: Ice Half-Troll
subraces.description: Descendants of ice trolls with white or light blue skin impervious to cold. They are expert shipmasters and javelin fishers.

subraces.name: Sand Half-Troll
subraces.description: Descendants of sand trolls with skin tones ranging from red to yellow. They are adapted to the harsh Scandurian deserts.

subraces.name: Tropical Half-Troll
subraces.description: Descendants of swamp trolls with blue or green skin. They are master explorers of the moist Bysso Isles.

subraces.name: War Half-Troll
subraces.description: Descendants of lake trolls with cyan or aqua skin. They are perpetual nomads accustomed to the warring Manyhal continent.

feat_halftroll_creature_type.name: Creature Type
feat_halftroll_creature_type.description: You are a Humanoid. You stand between 1.95 and 2.25 meters tall and reach adulthood at the age of 15.

feat_halftroll_ability_increase.name: Ability Score Increase
feat_halftroll_ability_increase.description: Increase one score by 2 and another by 1, or three different scores by 1. Your Constitution maximum is 22.

feat_halftroll_regeneration.name: Half-Troll Regeneration
feat_halftroll_regeneration.description:
• As a Bonus Action, you can expend one Hit Die to regain hit points equal to your lvl + con modifier.
• If you have taken Fire or Acid damage, you cannot use this feature until the start of your next turn.
• You can use this to recuperate limbs or heal injuries instead of gaining hit points. You cannot regenerate your head.

feat_halftroll_reicing.name: Re-icing
feat_halftroll_reicing.description: When using Half-Troll Regeneration, you may choose to heal yourself of one disease, Poisoned effect, or short-term curse instead of regaining hit points.

feat_halftroll_sandstrum.name: Sandstrum
feat_halftroll_sandstrum.description: You can see in lightly obscured areas within 9 meters as if they were not obscured, and in heavily obscured areas as if they were lightly obscured.

feat_halftroll_swamp_spirit.name: Swamp Spirit
feat_halftroll_swamp_spirit.description: You are unaffected by nonmagical difficult terrain.

feat_halftroll_unprovoked.name: Unprovoked
feat_halftroll_unprovoked.description: You have Advantage when rolling for Initiative.
